Products.Headline: MORE THAN JUST A WAY TO GET AROUND—THE TEMPT E+ IS FREEDOM, FUN AND JOY.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: LIGHTER WEIGHT
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The lightweight ALUXX aluminum frame design provides a quick, agile ride feel. Featuring a new integrated head tube with fewer welds, giving it a sleek, carbon-like modern appearance while also keeping weight down.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: POWERFUL
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: With the SyncDrive Sport 2 motor and removable 430Wh battery, this bike provides strong, consistent support wherever you ride. Need to go even farther? An optional 200Wh range extender is available for longer range.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: INTELLIGENT
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: Packed with innovative features, the E-Lock system lets you lock the bike remotely via the App or control unit. Apple Find My compatibility locates your bike with your iPhone, sounds an alarm and sends alerts if the bike is moved, offering added peace of mind.

Products.Name: Seek 1
Products.MetaDescription: For a road and gravel cyclist, there’s a special time that comes before the WorldTour, before pro and elite, even before juniors: right now. Built without compromise, the all-new Liv Seek drop bar bike for kids is lightweight, agile, and ready to go fast. It features the same innovative technology as all our performance road and gravel bikes, but it’s not merely a small version of an adult bike—every detail has been optimized for youth, from geometry to components, plus an easily adjustable fit.

Products.Headline: For a road and gravel cyclist, there’s a special time that comes before the WorldTour, before pro and elite, even before juniors: right now. Built without compromise, the all-new Liv Seek drop bar bike for kids is lightweight, agile, and ready to go fast. It features the same innovative technology as all our performance road and gravel bikes, but it’s not merely a small version of an adult bike—every detail has been optimized for youth, from geometry to components, plus an easily adjustable fit.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: LIGHT AND AGILE
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Liv Seek features a lightweight frame design, ultra-light wheel system, and youth-specific gearing, so young riders can achieve the cadence and control they need to pull away from the pack.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: YOUTH-OPTIMIZED CONTROL
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: With youth-specific brake levers and 1x small-hand e-shifting, plus modulated hydraulic disc brakes, the Liv Seek makes it easy for kids to ride with the confidence of their favorite pros.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: EFFORTLESS FIT
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Liv Seek empowers kids with youth-specific geometry and shorter cranks, plus an easily adjustable seatpost with intuitive height marking, allowing the bike to grow with the rider.

Technologies.Name: OverDrive
Technologies.Description: Designed to provide precise front-end steering performance, this fork steerer tube technology uses oversized headset bearings (1 1/4” lower and 1 1/8” upper for road, 1 1/2” lower and 1 1/8” upper for mountain) and tapered steerer tube work in conjunction to provide optimal steering stiffness.

Technologies.Name: D-Fuse Seatpost
Technologies.Description: The proprietary “D” shaped composite seatpost damps vibration, resulting in a smooth, compliant ride.

Technologies.Name: Advanced Composite Technology
Technologies.Description: Liv’s High-Performance Grade raw carbon material is used to produce this frameset in our own composite factory. Using state-of-the-art materials and manufacturing techniques, Liv’s Advanced-Grade Composite frames are designed to offer light weight and stiffness with optimal compliance.

Technologies.Name: ALUXX Aluminum Technology
Technologies.Description: This Performance level frame material features 6061 alloy with single-butted tubes to produce strong, lightweight framesets for a variety of different bikes and riding styles.

Technologies.Name: Tubeless System
Technologies.Description: Engineered with proprietary Dynamic Balanced Lacing technology, this tubeless ready composite WheelSystem delivers superior efficiency, pinpoint control and comfort.

Technologies.Name: Compact Road Design
Technologies.Description: When introduced by Giant in 1990s, Compact Road revolutionized the look and feel of high-performance road bikes forever. A downward sloping toptube (from the headtube to the seattube) creates smaller front and rear triangles for a lighter, stiffer bike. It also makes it easier for riders of all sizes to have a perfect fit.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Lightweight Advantage
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Avail Advanced delivers lightweight efficiency, thanks to an all-new Advanced-grade composite frame and an Advanced-grade composite fork, which boosts your climbing abilities and makes you virtually uncatchable over long distances.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Superior Compliance
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: Ride longer without riding harder, with the reengineered frame and fork, optimized for the smoothest, most efficient riding experience. The innovative Liv Contact D-Fuse handlebar and D-Fuse seatpost absorb more road vibrations than round-shaped tubing, without sacrificing efficiency on corners and climbs.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Maximum Control
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Liv Contact D-Fuse handlebar features an ergonomic shape and 8-degree flare drop, for total control on those sunrise-to-sunset rides. Wide, alloy rims are designed for high-volume tubeless tires (up to 38mm), providing predictable handling and stability from asphalt to pavé.

Products.Headline: The Devote was designed to satisfy your gravel wanderlust. Balancing performance and ruggedness, this versatile bike is ready for anything from short cuts through the woods to long, winding trails, as well as crushing your first gravel race.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Lightweight and Sleek
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The durable yet lightweight ALUXX-grade aluminum frame with an Advanced-grade composite fork offer a smooth and forgiving ride, handy when you find yourself on the road less traveled. The redesigned geometry puts you in a more performance-oriented position and gives you added control whether you’re picking up speed or detouring downhill to the swimming hole.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Superior Comfort and Control
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Contact XR D-Fuse handlebar features a 5-degree back sweep and flare drop for a comfortable and ergonomic grip. The Contact D-Fuse seatpost can be swapped out for a 30.9mm or 27.2mm round seatpost. These proprietary D-Fuse components absorb bumps and reduce vibrations, ensuring less fatigue and more fun on those epic rides.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Unmatched Versatility
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: Adapt to the route with the flip chip – dropout, which lets you adjust your wheelbase length and rear-wheel tire clearance. Go shorter for responsive handling and quick acceleration. Go longer for added stability plus clearance for larger tires and extra traction.

Technologies.Name: OverDrive
Technologies.Description: Designed to provide precise front-end steering performance, this fork steerer tube technology uses oversized headset bearings (1 1/4” lower and 1 1/8” upper for road, 1 1/2” lower and 1 1/8” upper for mountain) and tapered steerer tube work in conjunction to provide optimal steering stiffness.

Technologies.Name: Tubeless System
Technologies.Description: Engineered with proprietary Dynamic Balanced Lacing technology, this tubeless ready composite WheelSystem delivers superior efficiency, pinpoint control and comfort.

Technologies.Name: D-Fuse Technology
Technologies.Description: The D-Fuse seatpost and handlebar were designed to function as a system to absorb shocks and vibrations from various surfaces, ensuring a smoother and more efficient ride.

Technologies.Description: This Performance level frame material features 6061 alloy with single-butted tubes to produce strong, lightweight framesets for a variety of different bikes and riding styles.

Products.Headline: The Embolden is built for riders who want to spend more time riding and less time worrying about their bike. Developed using insights from women riders, its geometry and suspension balance stability, control, and efficiency to create a ride that feels intuitive on the trail. With a lightweight aluminum frame, FlexPoint suspension, and modern trail geometry, Embolden builds confidence as riders move from forest paths to proper singletrack.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Balanced Handling That Builds Confidence
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: Embolden’s modern trail geometry creates a balanced, confidence-inspiring ride, while a size-specific wheel strategy ensures every rider gets the handling that works best for them. Mixed wheels on XS and S frames improve maneuverability and fit, while dual 29-inch wheels on M and L roll smoothly over trail obstacles and maintain momentum. A dropper seatpost lets you quickly lower the saddle for descents and technical sections, helping you stay comfortable and in control as the trail gets more exciting.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Reliable Performance, Thoughtfully Designed
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The lightweight ALUXX-grade aluminum frame keeps Embolden efficient on climbs and durable for everyday trail adventures. Smart details like a semi-integrated shock design, easy to set up suspension guide on the fork, improved cable routing, and a heavy-duty molded chainstay protector help keep maintenance simple and the bike running quietly. With reliable components and a clean, practical design, Embolden is built to spend more time out on the trail—and less time in the garage.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Smooth Suspension, Simple Setup
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: FlexPoint rear suspension delivers smooth, predictable control through 130mm of rear-wheel travel, paired with 140mm of front suspension for confident capability on modern trails. The system maintains traction over roots, rocks, and technical terrain while providing a supportive, stable ride feel as trail conditions change.

Technologies.Name: ALUXX Aluminum Technology
Technologies.Description: This Performance level frame material features 6061 alloy with single-butted tubes to produce strong, lightweight framesets for a variety of different bikes and riding styles.

Technologies.Name: PowerCore
Technologies.Description: A massively oversized bottom-bracket/chainstay area features a fully integrated, 86-millimeter wide bottom-bracket design (92-millimeterwide for off-road bikes). Asymmetric chainstays provide additional stiffness on the driveside and stability on the non-driveside.

Technologies.Name: Tubeless System
Technologies.Description: Engineered with proprietary Dynamic Balanced Lacing technology, this tubeless ready composite WheelSystem delivers superior efficiency, pinpoint control and comfort.

Technologies.Name: FlexPoint Suspension Technology
Technologies.Description: A proven “single-pivot” design that uses the flexing action of the chainstay/seatstay junction to produce a lightweight and durable suspension system with 4.7 inches/120mm of rear travel.

Technologies.Name: OverDrive
Technologies.Description: Designed to provide precise front-end steering performance, this fork steerer tube technology uses oversized headset bearings (1 1/4” lower and 1 1/8” upper for road, 1 1/2” lower and 1 1/8” upper for mountain) and tapered steerer tube work in conjunction to provide optimal steering stiffness.

Products.Name: Langma Advanced 0
Products.MetaDescription: The official bike of road riding season, the Langma Advanced was designed to climb mountains and leaderboards. The re-engineered frameset and components are seamlessly integrated for effortless ascents and fearless descents. Streamlined aerodynamics round out this all-rounder, inspiring you to push limits all day long.

Products.Headline: The official bike of road riding season, the Langma Advanced was designed to climb mountains and leaderboards. The re-engineered frameset and components are seamlessly integrated for effortless ascents and fearless descents. Streamlined aerodynamics round out this all-rounder, inspiring you to push limits all day long.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: QOM-LEVEL EFFICIENCY
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The re-engineered frameset and integrated components yield efficient power transfer for quick bursts of speed and sustained climbing prowess.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: LIMIT-PUSHING CONTROL
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: Up to 33mm tire clearance means you’re ready for any road, from the freshly-poured to the weather-beaten, without compromising handling. The flared handlebar injects control and confidence into those explosive sprints and bomber descents.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: GAP-WIDENING AERO
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: With truncated ellipse tube shapes and a new internal cable routing design, you’ll reduce drag, pick up speed, and watch the scenery fly by.

Technologies.Name: Advanced Composite Technology
Technologies.Description: Liv’s High-Performance Grade raw carbon material is used to produce this frameset in our own composite factory. Using state-of-the-art materials and manufacturing techniques, Liv’s Advanced-Grade Composite frames are designed to offer light weight and stiffness with optimal compliance.

Technologies.Name: Compact Road Design
Technologies.Description: When introduced by Giant in 1990s, Compact Road revolutionized the look and feel of high-performance road bikes forever. A downward sloping toptube (from the headtube to the seattube) creates smaller front and rear triangles for a lighter, stiffer bike. It also makes it easier for riders of all sizes to have a perfect fit.

Technologies.Name: PowerCore
Technologies.Description: A massively oversized bottom-bracket/chainstay area features a fully integrated, 86-millimeter wide bottom-bracket design (92-millimeterwide for off-road bikes). Asymmetric chainstays provide additional stiffness on the driveside and stability on the non-driveside.

Technologies.Name: Tubeless System
Technologies.Description: Engineered with proprietary Dynamic Balanced Lacing technology, this tubeless ready composite WheelSystem delivers superior efficiency, pinpoint control and comfort.

Products.Headline: The STP 20 is a lightweight, confidence-building bike for riders discovering off-road fun. Its stable geometry, low stand-over height, and youth-specific components make it ideal for developing skills on pump tracks, dirt jumps, or local trails.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: BUILT TO LAST
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The ALUXX-grade aluminum frame combines durability and low weight, giving young riders a solid platform to ride, learn, and progress. The STP 20 FS adds a 63 mm suspension fork for extra comfort and control on rougher terrain.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: YOUTH-TUNED CONTROL
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: Designed for riders 110–130 cm tall, the STP 20 features youth-specific components, including 105 mm short cranks, a Liv Grit Core Lite saddle, and smaller-diameter handlebars for an optimal fit. Youth-tuned hydraulic disc brakes provide smooth, predictable stopping power, while the low bottom bracket height ensures a stable, balanced feel on all terrain.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: TRICK-READY HANDLING
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The 20-inch TRA 2 WheelSystem with Wide Guard rim technology provides durability and traction for playful, confident riding. Front and rear thru-axles add steering precision and stability, while the short rear center keeps handling nimble and easy to maneuver.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: RUGGED RELIABILITY
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The lightweight yet durable ALUXX-grade aluminum frame, built to downhill-level strength standards, ensures the STP 26 can handle the toughest jumps, tricks, and terrain. Paired with the Giant TRA 2 WheelSystem featuring Wide Guard rim technology, it delivers proven durability and impact resistance for hard landings and long sessions. And with a lifetime frame warranty, riders can send it with confidence, knowing Liv’s got their back.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: CONTROL UNDER PRESSURE
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Giant Contact TR35 handlebar delivers a stable, responsive feel for confident control on jumps, drops, and technical terrain. KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: READY FOR LANDING
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Marzocchi Bomber DJ 100 mm fork and closed horizontal dropout provide the precision and stability needed for dirt jumps, drops, and technical trails. The fork’s stiff chassis and smooth damping absorb big impacts with control, while the reinforced rear triangle enhances stiffness and power transfer for confident takeoffs and landings.

Products.Headline: The design of the Avail Advanced E+ Elite AR stealthily conceals its potent electric capabilities. A compact rear hub motor, lightweight carbon frame and fork, hidden controls, and internal cable routing is the epitome of a beautiful, high-end road bike that looks fast—even when it’s not moving.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: A Natural Ride
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: It looks like an analog road bike and, best of all, it rides like one. Experience the revolutionary fusion of electric power and traditional road cycling with our new E-Road exclusive riding pattern. It provides the ultimate smooth motor support so your riding experience still feels authentic and au naturel.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Maximum Miles. Minimum Fatigue.
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The Avail Advanced E+ Elite AR provides up to 600Wh with its 400Wh main battery and the optional 200Wh range extender. It features Avail endurance geometry for long-ride comfort, while the Liv D-Fuse handlebar and seatpost absorb road vibrations, giving you a smooth and enjoyable riding experience.

KeyPerformanceFactors.Title: Delivering Power & Speed
KeyPerformanceFactors.Text: The SyncDrive Move Plus Motor is a powerful rear hub motor with a maximum torque of  30 Nm which is comparable to 75 Nm in a mid-drive motor. It provides the maximum assisted speed to reach the speed limit of 45 km/h / 28 mph (US), 32 km/h (Canada), and 25 km/h (in other regions worldwide).

Technologies.Name: Advanced Composite Technology
Technologies.Description: Liv’s High-Performance Grade raw carbon material is used to produce this frameset in our own composite factory. Using state-of-the-art materials and manufacturing techniques, Liv’s Advanced-Grade Composite frames are designed to offer light weight and stiffness with optimal compliance.

Technologies.Name: RideControl Go
Technologies.Description: This console features two rows of lights and a power button and is integrated into the top tube to display mode and battery level at a glance. It functions on its own as a minimalist control panel or it can work in tandem with the RideControl Ergo 3, providing an additional way of selecting your support mode.

Technologies.Name: SyncDrive Move
Technologies.Description: The SyncDrive Move literally moves the motor to the rear hub of the bicycle. Found in our youth bike range, this compact motor delivers 30Nm of torque for a smooth, confidence-inspiring ride. It features 3 support modes to help young riders climb with less effort. For kids’ safety the power mode will stay on for only 10 seconds, serving as a fun boost. It also features Smart Assist technology which uses five sensors to determine a smooth and natural pedaling support.

Technologies.Name: EnergyPak
Technologies.Description: Breeze through any ride with a state-of-the-art Liv EnergyPak battery. Our innovations include EnergyPak Smart series, EnergyPak series, and the EnergyPak Plus spare battery to pack along. Safety and efficiency remain our priority to keep you riding safely for long adventures.
